payload.answer: I found a relationship conflict for Sara: she is already recorded as your daughter, but the new input says she is your niece. Please choose how to handle this.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both facts separately, preserving the ambiguity.
Clarify the relationship, e.g. Sara is both my daughter and niece in different contexts, or one of the statements is incorrect.
